title: Fleet Command annex
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Fleet Command annex''' was the annex of the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Fleet Command (space station)|Fleet Command]] orbiting [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], and could be detached from the station if necessary. [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and [[Vergere]] were held there when they escaped from [[Yuuzhan Vong empire|Yuuzhan Vong space]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
